CustomField.inlineHelpText: Pre-Qualification:Has indicated interest in our business by completing a form, badge scan or subscribing to a newsletter, attending a webinar, opening an email, downloading content. Marketing Qualified Lead: A contact who has shown interest and engagement with our marketing efforts that has met the qualifying criteria. Sales Accepted Lead:Once an MQL is reviewed and deemed potentially valuable by the sales team, it becomes a SAL. Sales Qualified Lead:Has been vetted by sales and determined to be a good
CustomField.label: Qualification Type
